dc:title: Street view with fortified wall and domed church
dc:description: Urban street scene photographed from a low roadside position, with an out-of-focus bicycle or scooter saddle and handlebars occupying the foreground. A curving paved roadway runs through the center of the image with several automobiles and a van in motion or parked along the street. At left, a large stone fortification or city wall with crenellations extends along the road, with a pedestrian visible near its base. Behind and above the wall is a church building with a ribbed dome and lantern. At right are a sidewalk, trees, streetlights, bollards, and low commercial or residential buildings, including an outdoor seating area. The image appears to document the relationship between historic masonry architecture and contemporary street traffic in an urban setting.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
